info.name: Lawyer API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for the Lawyer module with many-to-many relationships, authentication, CRUD operations, and file uploads. Includes all endpoints with proper request/response examples.

request.description: Get comprehensive dashboard data including profile info, statistics, and recent offerings.

request.description: Get availability slots for specific lawyer with filters

item.description:
List and create availability slots for lawyers

\- GET: Any authenticated user can view lawyer availability

\- POST: Only lawyer vendors can create availibility

\- PUT/PATCH/DELETE: Only the owner lawyer can modify

request.description: Get unavailability statistics for authenticated lawyer

item.description:
Defines specific dates/times when lawyer is unavailable    (overrides regular availability)

List and create unavailability entries for lawyers   

\- GET: Any authenticated user can view lawyer unavailability   

\- POST: Only lawyer vendors can create unavailabilityEndFragment  
  
  

Unavailibility Types(Constant):

- vacation
    
- sick_leave
    
- personal
    
- court_appearance
    
- meeting
    
- training
    
- other

request.description: Delete all availability slots for authenticated lawyer
Delete all past unavailability entries for authenticated lawyer
Copy availability from one day to other days
Get weekdays and unavailability types (no auth required)

item.description:
| Endpoint | Anonymous | Authenticated Non-Lawyer | Lawyer Vendor | Admin |
|----------|-----------|---------------------------|---------------|-------|
| **List Availability** | ❌ | ✅ Read | ✅ Read/Write Own | ✅ All |
| **Availability Detail** | ❌ | ✅ Read | ✅ Read All, Write Own | ✅ All |
| **List Unavailability** | ❌ | ✅ Read | ✅ Read/Write Own | ✅ All |
| **Unavailability Detail** | ❌ | ✅ Read | ✅ Read All, Write Own | ✅ All |
| **Weekly View** | ❌ | ✅ Read (need lawyer_id) | ✅ Read All | ✅ All |
| **Calendar View** | ❌ | ✅ Read (need lawyer_id) | ✅ Read All | ✅ All |
| **Check Availability** | ❌ | ✅ Read | ✅ Read | ✅ All |
| **Bulk Operations** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Own Only | ✅ All |
| **Stats** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Own Only | ✅ All |
| **Clear/Copy** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Own Only | ✅ All |
| **Types Info** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
